title: June
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|June|hide31=yes}}
'''June''' is the sixth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. It has 30 days.

==Video game releases==
*'''June 19''' – ''[[Star Wars Scene Maker]]'' is released on iOS platforms in 2014.
*'''June 26''' – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided]]'' is released on the PC platform in 2003.

==Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' events==
*'''June 26''' – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] starts in 1997.
*'''June 26''' – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] starts in 2000.
*'''June 30''' – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] starts in 2003.
